## Summary

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (Biome lint/format)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New/updated tests for changes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)
